name: agentic-canvas
description: Use a local Agentic Canvas MCP server from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create and edit local visual canvases through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Agentic Canvas connects Codex to a local browser-based canvas over MCP. Use it to create freeform Excalidraw diagrams or JSON Canvas knowledge maps, inspect objects, apply atomic edits, arrange content, save files, and export screenshots.
defaultPrompt: Map this project on a canvas.
